conversation.text: We are an existing CINNOX customer. Does CINNOX support CRM integration via API?
CINNOX supports third-party integration via Webhook URL and Message API. Specific CRM connectors not confirmed in docs. Would you like to connect with a specialist?
Could I get your account ID or company name?
And could I get your name or the agent name on the account?
Thank you, Sophie. Connecting to technical specialist now.
